From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Peshawar](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Peshawar "wiktionary:Peshawar")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Peshawar](/wiki/Peshawar "Peshawar")** is the capital of the Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province of Pakistan.

**Peshawar** may also refer to:

## Places

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Peshawar_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Places")]

* [Peshawar, Afghanistan](/wiki/Peshawar,_Afghanistan "Peshawar, Afghanistan"), a village
* [Peshawar District](/wiki/Peshawar_District "Peshawar District"), Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan
* [Peshawar Cantonment](/wiki/Peshawar_Cantonment "Peshawar Cantonment"), in Peshawar city, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Peshawar_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [*Peshawar* (series)](/w/index.php?title=Peshawar_(series)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Peshawar (series) (page does not exist)"), a 2020 Indian web series by Ullu
* [Peshawar Zalmi](/wiki/Peshawar_Zalmi "Peshawar Zalmi"), a Pakistani cricket franchise
* [Peshawar cricket team](/wiki/Peshawar_cricket_team "Peshawar cricket team")
* [Abdur Rahman Peshawari](/wiki/Abdur_Rahman_Peshawari "Abdur Rahman Peshawari") (1886–1925), Turkish soldier, journalist and diplomat
